TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-frog_ofad

S.FORM: a pakimad ho kaku tu ccay a kakimadan u nu pakayniay i wawa.
S.TRANSL: 我來說有關小孩子的一個故事。
I will tell a story about a child.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩。
There was a child.

S.FORM: ira ku mi patelian nira i talid a takula’.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻他裝在瓶子裡的青蛙。
There was a frog which he put in a bottle.

S.FORM: sarumi’ami’adhan nira a minengneng.
S.TRANSL: 他每天都看著牠。
He looked at it everyday.

S.FORM: mara’or tu dadaya i mafuti’ tahira kaleda’an nira makuliniw nuya takula’ a milaliw.
S.TRANSL: 到晚上睡覺時間，他沈睡的時候，那個青蛙偷偷摸摸地離開。
When it was time to sleep at night and he was asleep, the frog left stealthily.

S.FORM: talipaalal cingra nengnenghan nira kiya talid.
S.TRANSL: 醒來後，他看了那個瓶子。
When he woke up, he looked at the bottle.

S.FORM: ya maparuay i talid a takula’ awa’ay tu maaraw ningra.
S.TRANSL: 他沒看到那隻原本裝在瓶子裡的青蛙。
He didn’t see the frog which he put in the bottle.

S.FORM: a minengneng talacuwacuwa sa tu hakiya sa a mikilim cingra.
S.TRANSL: cuwacuwa是reduplication，hakiya表「怎麼樣了呢」的擔憂心情用語。
He searched everywhere and wondered what happened to the frog.

S.FORM: nengnengen nira kiya safang nira yapi sapi ala nira tuya takula’.
S.TRANSL: 他尋找用來抓青蛙的那個網子。
He looked for the net that he used to catch that frog.

S.FORM: awa’ay tu matawma.
S.TRANSL: 沒找著。
(He) didn’t find (it).

S.FORM: halu ya wacu tu nira a mipadang a mi kilim tuya takula’.
S.TRANSL: 狗也幫忙他找尋那隻青蛙。
His dog helped him look for the frog.

S.FORM: sa hiningen nuya wacu kuya patelian tuya takula’ i.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗望著裝著青蛙的地方。
The dog looked at (the place) where the frog was kept.

S.FORM: awa’ay a manengneng nira sadak sa tu a.
S.TRANSL: 牠沒有看到，他打算出去找。
He didn’t see (the frog). (He went) outside.

S.FORM: mahicurcur a mikilim kuya wacu na itira i sasingaran nu luma’.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗找著找著就從房子的窗戶頭朝前栽了下去。
Looking for (the frog), the dog fell head over heels from the window of the house.

S.FORM: na matiya tu i kuya wawa sa tu keridhan tu nira kuya wacu nira a mi tayra i paputal a mi nengneng.
S.TRANSL: 就在那個時候，那個小孩子帶領那隻狗到外面去看。
Then, the child took the dog outside to look (for the frog).

S.FORM: tahira cangra i lutuklutukan i.
S.TRANSL: 他們到了山林中。
They arrived at a forest.

S.FORM: adihay ku onal a maefer.
S.TRANSL: 很多蜜蜂在飛。
Many bees were flying.

S.FORM: u ma’an kuninian hakiya sa’an cangra saka.
S.TRANSL: 這個是什麼，他們如此想。
‘What is this?’ they thought.

S.FORM: ra’orhan nira manengneng nira ku luma’ nu na onal.
S.TRANSL: 他們接近，他們看到蜂窩。
As they came closer, they saw a beehive.

S.FORM: nengnenghan tu nura wacu miawaw a mikalic kalichan nuya wacu.
S.TRANSL: 他隻狗一直看著，不但叫又想爬上去。
The dog looked at (the beehive), barked, and (wanted to) climb (up the tree).

S.FORM: ma tefad tu kuya luma’ nuya onal saka.
S.TRANSL: 那個蜂窩掉下來了。
The beehive fell down.

S.FORM: laklak sa tu a ma efer ku pulong nuya onal tura kilakilangan.
S.TRANSL: 所以裡面的的蜜蜂四處飛散，全部的蜜蜂四處飛散在那個樹林中。
(As a result,) the bees flew out and scattered all over the forest.

S.FORM: na nu iya i ya miheningan nuya wawa tuya epong la’enu a itira a milimed kuya takula’ na sa’an ku falucu’ nira.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子觀望的時候，他心想，以為青蛙躲在涵洞裡面。
The child peeked into a hole, thinking that the frog was hiding inside there.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他看了。
He looked.

S.FORM: masadasadak u edu ku masadakay nira.
S.TRANSL: 結果忽然出現一隻老鼠。
A mouse appeared.

S.FORM: paliyaw ho cingra a mikalic tayra tuya kilang tayrahan nira tuya kilang i.
S.TRANSL: 他又跑回去爬上那一棵樹。
He went back and climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: awa’ay kuya takula’.
S.TRANSL: 沒有那隻青蛙。
The frog was not there.

S.FORM: sedak sa’an ku ekung pa cekuk ku falucu’ nira.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹突然出現，嚇了他一跳。
An owl suddenly appeared and frightened him.

S.FORM: ma tefad na itira tura kilang a makunkun cingra.
S.TRANSL: 他從樹上掉下來。
He fell down from the tree.

S.FORM: uya wacu sa tu i pakatengil tu cingra tu katefad nuya nuya tamdaw i.
S.TRANSL: 狗聽見他掉下來的聲音。
The dog heard him fall.

S.FORM: cingra sa na haw na miaw’aw’ a ya ca cingra tuya onal i.
S.TRANSL: 狗對蜜蜂吠。
(The dog) barked at the bees.

S.FORM: lawpen tu nuya onal cingra a mi law laliw sa tu cingra.
S.TRANSL: 那些蜜蜂開始追他，他就開始跑。
The bees began (chasing) it, and it ran away.

S.FORM: kuya sa tu ya wawa i mikilim mikilimek tu tayra i ongcuongcuyan.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩躲到了磐石之中。
The child hid behind the rocks.

S.FORM: ya wacu i mikilim tu tayra i dihif nu fakelokelohan.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗去了石堆的縫隙中躲避。
The dog hid among the rocks.

S.FORM: kecuren nuya ekung cingra.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹從高處看見他。
The owl was looking at it.

S.FORM: na matira cingra u kilang kuni hakiya sa tuya pitatuyan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他(小孩)在這樣之下，以為自己所握的東西是樹枝。
He held on to what he thought was a piece of wood.

S.FORM: nengnenghan ku malunem.
S.TRANSL: 看了之後原來是隻鹿。
He saw that it was a deer.

S.FORM: na uya na nu i cula’ han tu nuya malunem cingra a matamurum tayra i ‘apilis nu lutuk.
S.TRANSL: 就在當時，他被那隻鹿扛著，到了山的峭壁。
At that moment, the deer carried it to the cliff of the mountains.

S.FORM: tayra i ‘apilis nu lutuk i fahekulhan nuya malunem kuya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 被鹿扛著到達山的峭壁， 小孩子被甩出去。
At the cliff of the mountain, the deer flung the child.

S.FORM: halu wacu a matefad tayra i nanum.
S.TRANSL: 連狗都掉到水中。
The dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: tayra sa tu i nanum i kalichan tu nuya wacu kuya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 他們到水中之後，那一隻狗就爬在小孩子的身上。
After falling into the water, the dog climbed onto the child.

S.FORM: ta talahekal cangra.
S.TRANSL: 他們就到岸上去。
They (swam) toward the bank.

S.FORM: tahira cangra i hakal i a pasela.
S.TRANSL: 他們到達岸上後，休息。
After they reached the bank, they took a rest.

S.FORM: maaraw nangra kuya ta tusaay a takula’ ini kuya takula’.
S.TRANSL: 他們在這裡看見了兩隻青蛙。
They saw two frogs here.

S.FORM: ca ka talacuwa sa’an ku falucu’ nangra.
S.TRANSL: 「這個青蛙在這裡，沒有到別的地方！」他們心裡想。
"(The frog) didn’t go anywhere," they thought.

S.FORM: nengnenghan tu nira i aluman kiya takula’ kuya ‘al ‘al kuya ‘alu’.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見很多青蛙在河床上。
They saw many frogs in the river.

S.FORM: salipahak sa tu ku falucu’ a nangra na nu i.
S.TRANSL: 他心中感到非常高興。
They felt very happy.

S.FORM: ya i a a matira aca ca’ay tu ka rufuen aku kisu han tu nira kuya takula’ kuya alumanay a takula’.
S.TRANSL: 「如果是這樣的話我就不要把你們關起來。」
"If so, I will not imprison you."

S.FORM: a miliyas a minukay atu ya wacu.
S.TRANSL: （他）就和狗離開回家。
(He) left and went home with the dog.
